calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar May-14-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Nemer for Milda Kaitz (Petitioner).

Mr. Rice was not present in court. Mr. Nemer stated that Mr. Rice's request for review from the Supreme Court was denied. In addition, he stated that the only asset in the estate was $25.00 and stated that he wanted to drop the matter. The Court took the matters off calendar.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Obi.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petn For Letters Of Administration
Off Calendar May-14-2008 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-05-2008 Continued To May-14-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Nemer for Milda Kaitz. Harry Rice for Rosabel Almandares (Special Administrator).

Mr. Nemer reported that the judgment was affirmed on January 28th, that they were waiting for the remittiter from the appellate court, and that the Unlawful Detainer action was on for March 10, 2008. Mr. Rice stated that the Quiet Title action on appeal was affirmed on behalf of the Plaintiff, that Ms. Almanderes was to file her petition with the Supreme Court, that the only assets his client had control of were the Condo and the $25.00 bank account, that there was no insurance refund, that he was not sure of the status of the insurance, and that the property taxes were current. In addition, he stated that no rent was being paid, and that he felt his client should be paid rents as there was an operating business in the property. The Court asked Mr. Rice to direct his client to keep track of what she has paid in the event of an accounting being required at some time in the future. The matter was continued to May 14, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petn For Letters Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-05-2008 Continued To May-14-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-09-2008 Continued To Mar-05-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Nemer for Milda Kaitz (Petitioner).

The Court noted that Mr Rice was not present. Mr. Nemer reported that oral argument on the appeal matter was going to be heard on January 23rd. The matter was continued to March 5, 2008 for further status. The Court will contact Mr. Rice to notify him of the next hearing date.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-09-2008 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petn For Letters Of Administration
Off Calendar Jan-09-2008 Continued To Mar-05-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-18-2007 Continued To Jan-09-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES- ATTY. DAVID NEMER FOR THE PETITIONER;

THE COURT QUESTIONED WHETHER MR. NEMER GAVE NOTICE TO ATTY. RICE REGARDING THIS HEARING. MR. NEMER INDICATED THAT HE GAVE NOTICE OF THE STATUS HEARING WHICH WAS FILED ON SEPTEMBER 19, 2007. MR. NEMER REPORTED TO THE COURT THAT THERE IS AN APPEAL PENDING ON THE ORDER ISSUED BY JUDGE CHAITIN. THERE IS ALSO AN UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION WHICH WAS DELAYED FOR 6 MONTHS. MR. NEMER ALSO REPORTED THAT THE PROPERTY IS BEING USED AS A PARALEGAL OFFICE BY ROSABEL ALMENDARES. HE DOES NOT KNOW WHETHER RENT IS BEING PAID OR NOT. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO JANUARY 9, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR #11722 Clerk: Cynthia Herbert. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.
